## CONTENT_BLOCK

### Questions and Answers
- Q: How is my water bill calculated?
  A: Your bill = (volume used × tariff per kilolitre) + fixed service fee + sewerage charge (80% of water used). Tariffs are tiered: first 5 kL at a lower rate, above at a higher rate.
